name: Aryabhatta Hostel
description: Exclusively for first-year undergraduate students, offering triple-sharing rooms to promote peer interaction. Features a spacious mess hall, common recreation room with a TV, outdoor badminton court, and 24/7 security guard patrol.
Name: Aryabhatta Hostel
Description: Exclusively for first-year undergraduate students, offering triple-sharing rooms to promote peer interaction. Features a spacious mess hall, common recreation room with a TV, outdoor badminton court, and 24/7 security guard patrol.

name: Raman Hostel
description: Accommodates second and third-year B.Tech students in double-sharing rooms. Includes an indoor table tennis table, fully functional mess serving vegetarian and non-vegetarian food, and high-speed Wi-Fi router connectivity on each corridor.
Name: Raman Hostel

name: CV Raman Hostel
description: A hostel for senior students and postgraduates offering single and double rooms. Equipped with a small gymnasium area, library reading corner, volleyball court, and automated washing machines for student convenience.
Name: CV Raman Hostel

name: Vivekananda Hostel
description: Houses final year undergraduate students and PhD scholars in single-occupancy rooms. It features a quiet study hall, mess hall with special menu days, and an outdoor courtyard for evening recreation.

name: Gargi Hostel
description: The primary hostel for first and second-year female students. Features double and triple-sharing rooms, a tight security network, beauty parlor service corner, indoor sports facility, and a hygienic mess offering nutritious meals.
Name: Gargi Hostel

name: Sarojini Hostel
description: Accommodates senior undergraduate and postgraduate female students in single and double rooms. It contains a garden courtyard, common lounge, library space, and automatic washing machine facilities.
Name: Sarojini Hostel

name: New Girls Hostel
description: A modern multi-storey hostel building for female students with premium single-sharing rooms, elevators, and modern bathrooms. Includes a gym room, juice bar counter, and study rooms on each floor.
Name: New Girls Hostel

name: International Students Hostel
description: Specially designed for international students, NRI students, and exchange scholars. It offers air-conditioned single rooms, attached kitchenettes, dining area serving diverse cuisines, and laundry service.
